title: Coronavirus Lateral Flow Assay (LFA) operation protocol v2
steps: Place ELISA plate on lid so that angled towards you.
Vortex conjugate to mix (gold particles settle out) and pipette 1 µL into front of first well (A1).
Pipette 50 µL, PBS into first well of next row (B1).
Add 40 µL of sample (follow the sample preparation protocol for sample preparation) to conjugateand mix by pipetting, keeping mixture at front of well.
Place bottom end of LFA strip in conjugate/sample mixture.
Allow reagents to move up strip by capillary action for approximately 00:23:00
Transfer strip to PBS well for approximately 00:02:00 to wash away unbound gold conjugate and improve signal vs background.

Read results on strips. The upper band (control line) should be present in all samples, ensuringcorrect performance of the assay. The ‘test line’ will appear below the ‘control line’ if the sample isSARS-CoV-2 positive.
creator: peijun he
